data.title: Cloud-Based Services
data.description: Adobe's architecture heavily relies on cloud services to deliver its software products.
data.technical_spec: Distributed cloud architecture using AWS and Azure.

data.title: Microservices Architecture
data.description: Adobe employs a microservices approach to enable scalability and flexibility.

data.title: API-First Design
data.description: APIs are extensively used for internal and external integrations.

data.title: Serverless Applications
data.description: Some functionalities are managed through serverless computing to optimize resources.

data.title: Content Delivery Network (CDN)
data.description: Adobe uses CDNs to efficiently deliver content globally.
data.technical_spec: Akamai and Cloudflare as CDN providers.
